failure_categories.definition: The guard does not intercept the attack path.
The attack continues through the blocking limb without a stop.
Contact or recoil appears before the attacking limb approaches.
The limbs meet but show no visible deceleration or recoil.
Character identities swap or arms merge at the block.
Camera, framing, scene, weather, floor, or style departs from the manifest.

hypothesis: Explicit interception and force-transfer language will improve the model's ability to render a block as the cause of an attack stopping at contact.
prompt_text: Cinematic fantasy, rainy ancient temple courtyard, wet stone floor. One continuous medium shot at eye level with a static camera. The white haired warrior initiates one controlled forearm strike. Before it reaches the black armored warrior's torso, the black armored warrior raises one forearm into the exact path. Show one clear forearm-to-forearm contact point; at contact the strike decelerates to a stop and both arms recoil only slightly. Keep both feet grounded and identities stable. No missed block, pass-through, second strike, position swap, fall, flight, extra subject, magic, injury, gore, camera movement, or scene change.

success_criteria.description: The white haired warrior clearly initiates one forearm strike toward the black armored warrior.
The black armored warrior raises one forearm into the strike path before impact.
The two forearms visibly meet at one readable contact point.
The incoming strike stops at the block and both arms show a small proportional recoil.
Neither warrior crosses through, swaps position, falls, or leaves the ground.
The static medium eye-level composition and fixed environment are preserved.
